productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Women Steel Plated Watch
description: Sleek and stylish to the hilt, this maxima analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and comfort, this watch makes for an excellent daily wear. Case diameter: 12 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a leather strap Maxima logo at the 12-hour mark Slim white leather straps with a tang clasp Interconnected 6 and 12-hour mark Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters - wearable while washing hands and in mild rain
